Tracker

⏱ Time This Week
📊 Last 6 Weeks 🟢 on target  🟡 halfway  🔴 under
🧠 Mood Indices — Last 6 Weeks
📅 Monthly Averages
🌸 Mood by Cycle Phase

Average scores per cycle phase, calculated from your actual log data.

💤 Sleep Quality vs Mood

Each dot is one day. Hover to see the date. Better sleep = further right; better mood = higher up.

😰 Anxiety vs Activation

Each dot is one day. High anxiety + low activation = burnout zone. Low anxiety + high activation = flow zone.
